title: Luxury Property Sales Manager
description: Sell multi-million dollar villas on the stunning island of Phuket. We represent the most exclusive developments on the island and cater to UHNW clients from around the globe.
requirements: Proven success in luxury sales (real estate, cars, yachts)
Ability to build rapport quickly with wealthy individuals
responsibilities: Host VIP clients on property tours
Present investment opportunities and lifestyle benefits
Manage the sales pipeline from inquiry to closing
Collaborate with marketing team on campaigns
